_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Acquire necessary resources, including financial resources, to conduct an effective enterprise continuity of operations program.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain the enterprise data and AI strategy, aligned to business objectives, with defined investment priorities, milestones, accountability assignments, and success metrics.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-006 (DG, cosine: 0.543), LS-T-005 (LS, cosine: 0.540).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.5/10 (raw 0.348). Shared vocabulary: [enterprise]. DCWF-only terms [acquire, conduct, continuity, effective, financial, necessary] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, ai, aligned, assignments, business, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.877, R=0.865). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (82.6%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Acquire necessary resources, including financial resources, to conduct an effect" and "Develop and maintain the enterprise data and AI strategy, aligned to business ob". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.584 > STS 0.348 (gap +0.237). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [enterprise] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.1%. Shared tokens: [enterprise]. DCWF-only: [acquire, conduct, continuity, effective, financial, necessary]. WIDAI-only: [accountability, ai, aligned, assignments, business, data].
